title: hemizonia laevis
intro: Hemizonia laevis, also known as the smooth tansy aster or coast range tansyaster, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Hemizonia laevis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Hemizonia laevis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in folk remedies to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
